# supportsSymbolicLinks

**Instance Property**

A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports symbolic links.

## Declaration

```swift
var supportsSymbolicLinks: Bool { get set }
```

## Declaring linking capabilities

- **supportsHardLinks**: A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports hard links.

items.description: A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports hard links.
